title: Joshuas Textures (Unsupported)
description: This is a beta texture pack I'm working on for fun, its vanilla textures with changes I felt looked good but I need feedback so give it your best shot and tell me what I should add to it :D
body:
**Description:**

This resource pack offers a fresh take on the vanilla Minecraft textures, modified to suit my personal aesthetic preferences. Currently in Alpha, the pack includes:

- New textures for grass blocks, stone, oak logs, iron, diamond blocks, etc.
- Altered item names
- with a blue, pocket-like survival inventory hotbar
- Plains background panorama
- Gravel Minecraft title
- New font inspired by early arcade games

**Feedback Request:**

I'm seeking feedback to improve the pack, so feel free to send your suggestions on Discord.

**Compatibility:**

Although you might see a warning from Sodium, the pack is compatible. Note that I use a shader which might affect the appearance.

**Audience:**

This pack is for those who appreciate the original textures but want some changes.

Sorry but the ord. will not delete
